title: An Act relative to the issuance of certain liquor licenses in the city of Easthampton

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Gómez of Easthampton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5445) of Homar Gómez (with the approval of the city council) that the city of Easthampton be authorized the issue 8 additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 06/23/2026 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in B-1
